item.title: Borders, Bullets, and Brain Drains
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Borders, Bullets, and Brain Drains

At the border, diversity’s stalled,
While aid sites in Gaza are mauled.
With cuts so severe,
The scientists fear,
And nations like China are called.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Border Officials Told Not to Attend Events Tied to Diversity in Law Enforcement
  • At Least 27 Killed After Israeli Soldiers Open Fire Near Gaza Aid Site
  • As the Trump Administration Slashes Federal Spending, Scientists Consider Leaving the U.S.

item.title: A Trumpian Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

A Trumpian Tango

Trump’s cuts left scientists in despair,
While judges picked with little care,
Tariffs on steel,
Made trade less ideal,
And students found visas quite rare.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • World Scientists Look Elsewhere as U.S. Labs Stagger Under Trump Cuts
  • Trump, Bashing the Federalist Society, Asserts Autonomy on Judge Picks
  • Trump Pledges to Double Tariffs on Foreign Steel and Aluminum to 50%
  • How Trump Denying Visas to Chinese Students Could Backfire on the US

item.title: Tariffs and Tumult
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariffs and Tumult

Trump’s tariffs set economies fraught,
With China and the U.S. caught.
Factories slowed down,
And growth lost its crown,
While science funds faced a drought.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • U.S. Economy Shrank in First Quarter as Trump Tariffs Loomed
  • Chinese Factories Slow in Early Sign of Trade War’s Toll
  • Trump’s Cuts to Science Funding Could Hurt U.S. Economy, Study Shows
